dashboard.label: Open-Meteo Setup & Overview
dashboard.description: TA-open-meteo — Current weather from the free Open-Meteo API, indexed into s4c_meteo (events) and s4c_meteo_metrics (metrics). No API key required. Scheduled every 5–60 min via Splunk scripted input.

search.query: index=s4c_meteo sourcetype=open_meteo:weather:json | stats count AS events_total dc(city) AS cities_reporting max(_time) AS last_ingest min(_time) AS first_ingest | eval age_min = round((now() - last_ingest) / 60, 1) | eval status = case( isnull(last_ingest), "✗ No data — check inputs.conf and index name", age_min <= 10, "✓ Healthy — last event " . age_min . " min ago", age_min <= 60, "⚠ Warning — last event " . age_min . " min ago", true(), "✗ Stale — last event " . age_min . " min ago") | eval last_ingest = strftime(last_ingest, "%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S %Z") | eval first_ingest = strftime(first_ingest, "%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S %Z") | fields status, events_total, cities_reporting, last_ingest, first_ingest | rename status AS "Status", events_total AS "Total Events", cities_reporting AS "Cities Reporting", last_ingest AS "Last Ingest", first_ingest AS "First Ingest"

| mstats count AS dp_count latest_time(_value) AS last_ingest WHERE index=s4c_meteo_metrics AND metric_name=* BY city | stats sum(dp_count) AS dp_total count AS cities_reporting max(last_ingest) AS last_ingest | eval age_min = round((now() - last_ingest) / 60, 1) | eval status = case( dp_total=0 OR isnull(dp_total), "✗ No data — check inputs.conf and index name", age_min <= 10, "✓ Healthy — last point " . age_min . " min ago", age_min <= 60, "⚠ Warning — last point " . age_min . " min ago", true(), "✗ Stale — last point " . age_min . " min ago") | eval last_ingest = strftime(last_ingest, "%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S %Z") | fields status, dp_total, cities_reporting, last_ingest | rename status AS "Status", dp_total AS "Total Data Points", cities_reporting AS "Cities Reporting", last_ingest AS "Last Ingest"
index=s4c_meteo sourcetype=open_meteo:weather:json | stats count BY city | sort - count
index=s4c_meteo sourcetype=open_meteo:weather:json | timechart span=30m count BY city

| makeresults count=2 | streamstats count AS row | eval "Index Name" = if(row=1, "s4c_meteo_metrics", "s4c_meteo") | eval "Type" = if(row=1, "Metrics", "Events") | eval "Used By" = if(row=1, "mstats queries, Metrics Dashboard", "Regular search, Events Dashboard") | eval "How to Create" = if(row=1, "Settings → Indexes → New Index → Index Data Type: Metrics", "Settings → Indexes → New Index → Index Data Type: Events") | table "Index Name", "Type", "Used By", "How to Create"

index=s4c_meteo sourcetype=open_meteo:weather:json | stats latest(temperature_2m) AS "Temp °C" latest(relative_humidity_2m) AS "Humidity %" latest(wind_speed_10m) AS "Wind km/h" latest(weather_code) AS "WMO Code" max(_time) AS "Last Seen" BY city, country, country_code, timezone | eval "Temp °C" = round('Temp °C', 1) | eval "Humidity %" = round('Humidity %', 0) | eval "Wind km/h" = round('Wind km/h', 1) | eval "Last Seen" = strftime('Last Seen', "%H:%M:%S") | sort city | rename city AS "City", country AS "Country", country_code AS "CC", timezone AS "Timezone"

| makeresults count=15 | streamstats count AS row | eval "Events Index Field" = case( row=1, "temperature_2m", row=2, "apparent_temperature", row=3, "relative_humidity_2m", row=4, "precipitation", row=5, "rain", row=6, "showers", row=7, "snowfall", row=8, "wind_speed_10m", row=9, "wind_gusts_10m", row=10, "wind_direction_10m", row=11, "weather_code", row=12, "pressure_msl", row=13, "surface_pressure", row=14, "cloud_cover", row=15, "is_day") | eval "Metrics Index Key" = "meteo." . 'Events Index Field' | eval "Unit" = case( row=1, "°C", row=2, "°C (feels like)", row=3, "%", row=4, "mm", row=5, "mm", row=6, "mm", row=7, "cm", row=8, "km/h", row=9, "km/h", row=10, "° (0 – 360)", row=11, "WMO code", row=12, "hPa", row=13, "hPa", row=14, "%", row=15, "1 = day / 0 = night") | table "Events Index Field", "Metrics Index Key", "Unit"

panel.title: How to Add or Remove Cities

search.query: | makeresults count=4 | streamstats count AS row | eval "Step" = case( row=1, "1 Open the script", row=2, "2 Edit CITIES list", row=3, "3 Delete geocoding cache", row=4, "4 Restart Splunk") | eval "Detail" = case( row=1, "$SPLUNK_HOME/etc/apps/TA-open-meteo/bin/open_meteo_weather.py", row=2, "Add: {\"name\": \"Tokyo\", \"country_code\": \"JP\"} Remove: delete or comment out the entry", row=3, "rm $SPLUNK_HOME/etc/apps/TA-open-meteo/bin/.geocache.json (forces fresh geocoding on next run)", row=4, "sudo systemctl restart Splunkd") | table "Step", "Detail"

panel.title: How to Add or Remove Metrics

search.query: | makeresults count=4 | streamstats count AS row | eval "Step" = case( row=1, "1 Open the script", row=2, "2 Edit METRIC_FIELDS list", row=3, "3 Update dashboard dropdowns", row=4, "4 Restart Splunk") | eval "Detail" = case( row=1, "$SPLUNK_HOME/etc/apps/TA-open-meteo/bin/open_meteo_weather.py", row=2, "Add any field from https://open-meteo.com/en/docs (current section). Remove: delete or comment out.", row=3, "Add the new field to the Metric dropdown in meteo_metrics.xml and meteo_events.xml", row=4, "sudo systemctl restart Splunkd") | table "Step", "Detail"

panel.title: How to Change the Collection Interval

search.query: | makeresults count=5 | streamstats count AS row | eval "Setting" = case( row=1, "File", row=2, "Stanza (metrics)", row=3, "Stanza (events)", row=4, "Supported numeric values", row=5, "Cron example") | eval "Value" = case( row=1, "$SPLUNK_HOME/etc/apps/TA-open-meteo/default/inputs.conf", row=2, "[script://./bin/open_meteo_weather.py metrics] interval = 300", row=3, "[script://./bin/open_meteo_weather.py events] interval = 300", row=4, "300 (5 min) 600 (10 min) 900 (15 min) 1800 (30 min) 3600 (60 min)", row=5, "*/15 * * * * (every 15 minutes via cron expression)") | table "Setting", "Value"

| makeresults count=5 | streamstats count AS row | eval "What" = case( row=1, "File to edit", row=2, "Metrics index field", row=3, "Events index field", row=4, "Also update", row=5, "Requirement") | eval "Detail" = case( row=1, "$SPLUNK_HOME/etc/apps/TA-open-meteo/default/inputs.conf", row=2, "index = s4c_meteo_metrics (in the metrics stanza)", row=3, "index = s4c_meteo (in the events stanza)", row=4, "Dashboard search queries in meteo_metrics.xml and meteo_events.xml", row=5, "New index must exist and be the correct type (Metrics or Events) before restarting") | table "What", "Detail"
